nasb.text: Or in case a man has no kinsman, but so recovers his means as to find sufficient for its redemption,

esv.text: If a man has no one to redeem it and then himself becomes prosperous and finds sufficient means to redeem it,

cnv.text: 如果沒有代贖人，而他自己的經濟能力改善，足夠把地贖回，

ccb.text: 如果无人为他赎回，而他自己渐渐富裕起来，有能力赎回，
